name: Status

task.description: Build a service status page for 'NimbusCloud Status' at 1920px wide. Top: an overall banner 'All Systems Operational' with a green indicator. Below, a 'Current status' section listing SEVEN services (API, Dashboard, CDN, Database, Auth, Webhooks, Email) each as a row with the service name (left) and a status pill (right): five 'Operational' (green), one 'Degraded Performance' (amber, for CDN), one 'Partial Outage' (red, for Webhooks). Below, a 'Uptime (90 days)' section showing, for each of the seven services, a row of 90 thin vertical bars (mostly green with a few amber/red) and a '99.98%' figure at the right. Below, an 'Incident history' timeline with 3 dated incident entries, each with a title, a colored severity dot, and a short description. Responsive: at 375px the service name and status pill stack within each row and the 90-bar strips remain on one line (may shrink).
requirements: An overall banner reads 'All Systems Operational' with a green status indicator
Exactly seven services are listed, each with a name and a status pill
Five services show green 'Operational', CDN shows amber 'Degraded Performance', Webhooks shows red 'Partial Outage'
Each of the seven services has an uptime strip of 90 thin vertical bars
Each uptime strip shows a percentage figure (e.g. 99.98%) aligned to its right
The incident history lists exactly three dated entries, each with a title, a severity dot, and a description
Status pill colors (green/amber/red) are used consistently between the service list and uptime bars
On desktop the seven rows are left-aligned and the pills are right-aligned in a consistent column
At 375px each service row stacks the name above its pill, and the 90-bar strip stays on a single line
The seven service rows share consistent height and vertical rhythm

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8">
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
  <title>NimbusCloud Status</title>
  <style>
    *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

    :root {
      --bg-page:      #f0f4f8;
      --bg-card:      #ffffff;
      --bg-header:    #0c1a2e;
      --border:       #dde3ed;
      --text-dark:    #0c1a2e;
      --text-mid:     #4a5568;
      --text-light:   #8898aa;
      --brand:        #0077cc;
      --radius:       10px;
      --shadow:       0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.07);

      --green:        #16a34a;
      --green-pill:   #dcfce7;
      --green-text:   #14532d;
      --green-bar:    #22c55e;

      --amber:        #b45309;
      --amber-pill:   #fef3c7;
      --amber-text:   #78350f;
      --amber-bar:    #f59e0b;

      --red:          #dc2626;
      --red-pill:     #fee2e2;
      --red-text:     #7f1d1d;
      --red-bar:      #ef4444;

      --bar-w:        4px;
      --bar-gap:      2px;
      --bar-h:        32px;
    }

    body {
      font-family: -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
      background: var(--bg-page);
      color: var(--text-dark);
      min-height: 100vh;
    }

    /* ── HEADER ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .site-header {
      background: var(--bg-header);
      padding: 0 40px;
      height: 64px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
    }
    .site-logo {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 12px;
      color: #fff;
      font-size: 19px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: -.3px;
    }
    .logo-icon {
      width: 34px;
      height: 34px;
      background: linear-gradient(135deg, #0077cc, #00b4d8);
      border-radius: 8px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: center;
    }
    .logo-icon svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; fill: #fff; }
    .header-time {
      color: #8898aa;
      font-size: 13px;
    }

    /* ── WRAPPER ─────────────────────────────────────── */
    .wrapper {
      max-width: 1100px;
      margin: 0 auto;
      padding: 0 40px 80px;
    }

    /* ── BANNER ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    .banner {
      margin: 40px 0 36px;
      background: #e8faf1;
      border: 1.5px solid #a7f3d0;
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      padding: 28px 36px;
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
    }
    .banner-dot {
      width: 18px;
      height: 18px;
      min-width: 18px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      background: var(--green);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 5px rgba(22,163,74,.18);
    }
    .banner-text {
      font-size: 22px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--green-text);
      letter-spacing: -.2px;
    }
    .banner-sub {
      margin-left: auto;
      font-size: 13px;
      color: var(--green);
      font-weight: 600;
      white-space: nowrap;
    }

    /* ── SECTION TITLE ───────────────────────────────── */
    .section-title {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 700;
      letter-spacing: .08em;
      text-transform: uppercase;
      color: var(--text-light);
      margin-bottom: 12px;
    }

    /* ── CARD ────────────────────────────────────────── */
    .card {
      background: var(--bg-card);
      border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
      border-radius: var(--radius);
      box-shadow: var(--shadow);
      overflow: visible;
    }

    /* ── CURRENT STATUS ──────────────────────────────── */
    .status-section { margin-bottom: 36px; }

    .service-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      justify-content: space-between;
      padding: 15px 28px;
      min-height: 58px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .service-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

    .service-name {
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-dark);
      flex: 1 1 auto;
      min-width: 0;
    }

    .pill {
      display: inline-flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 6px;
      padding: 5px 13px;
      border-radius: 100px;
      font-size: 12.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      white-space: nowrap;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pill-dot {
      width: 7px;
      height: 7px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .pill.green  { background: var(--green-pill);  color: var(--green-text); }
    .pill.green  .pill-dot { background: var(--green); }
    .pill.amber  { background: var(--amber-pill);  color: var(--amber-text); }
    .pill.amber  .pill-dot { background: var(--amber); }
    .pill.red    { background: var(--red-pill);    color: var(--red-text); }
    .pill.red    .pill-dot { background: var(--red); }

    /* ── UPTIME SECTION ──────────────────────────────── */
    .uptime-section { margin-bottom: 36px; }

    .uptime-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 16px;
      padding: 14px 28px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
      min-height: 62px;
    }
    .uptime-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

    .uptime-label {
      font-size: 14px;
      font-weight: 600;
      color: var(--text-dark);
      width: 100px;
      min-width: 100px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    .uptime-bars {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: var(--bar-gap);
      flex: 1 1 auto;
      min-width: 0;
      overflow: hidden;
      flex-wrap: nowrap;
    }

    .bar {
      width: var(--bar-w);
      min-width: var(--bar-w);
      height: var(--bar-h);
      border-radius: 2px;
      flex-shrink: 0;
      transition: opacity .15s;
    }
    .bar:hover { opacity: .7; }
    .bar.g { background: var(--green-bar); }
    .bar.a { background: var(--amber-bar); }
    .bar.r { background: var(--red-bar); }

    .uptime-pct {
      font-size: 13px;
      font-weight: 700;
      font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums;
      color: var(--text-mid);
      width: 58px;
      min-width: 58px;
      text-align: right;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }

    /* ── INCIDENT HISTORY ────────────────────────────── */
    .incident-section { margin-bottom: 36px; }

    .incident-list { padding: 4px 0; }

    .incident-entry {
      display: flex;
      gap: 24px;
      padding: 24px 28px;
      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    }
    .incident-entry:last-child { border-bottom: none; }

    .incident-date {
      font-size: 12.5px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-light);
      text-transform: uppercase;
      letter-spacing: .05em;
      min-width: 100px;
      padding-top: 2px;
    }

    .incident-body { flex: 1; }

    .incident-title-row {
      display: flex;
      align-items: center;
      gap: 10px;
      margin-bottom: 8px;
    }

    .severity-dot {
      width: 10px;
      height: 10px;
      border-radius: 50%;
      flex-shrink: 0;
    }
    .severity-dot.red   { background: var(--red);   box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--red-pill); }
    .severity-dot.amber { background: var(--amber); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--amber-pill); }
    .severity-dot.green { background: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--green-pill); }

    .incident-title {
      font-size: 15px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--text-dark);
    }

    .incident-desc {
      font-size: 14px;
      color: var(--text-mid);
      line-height: 1.6;
    }

    .incident-resolved {
      display: inline-block;
      margin-top: 8px;
      font-size: 12px;
      font-weight: 700;
      color: var(--green);
      background: var(--green-pill);
      padding: 2px 10px;
      border-radius: 100px;
    }

    /* ── FOOTER ──────────────────────────────────────── */
    footer {
      text-align: center;
      padding: 24px 0;
      color: var(--text-light);
      font-size: 13px;
      border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
      margin-top: 8px;
    }
    footer strong { color: var(--brand); }

    /* ── RESPONSIVE 375px ────────────────────────────── */
    @media (max-width: 480px) {
      .wrapper { padding: 0 16px 60px; }

      .site-header { padding: 0 16px; }

      .banner { padding: 20px 20px; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
      .banner-sub { margin-left: 0; }
      .banner-text { font-size: 17px; }

      /* Service rows: stack name above pill */
      .service-row {
        flex-direction: column;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 8px;
        padding: 14px 20px;
      }

      /* Uptime rows stay single line */
      .up
